summary: Completed frontend testing for EPIC-VAR (variant product feature). Desktop variant functionality FULLY WORKING: grouped catalog display, ProductQuickView popup, variant selection, unit selector (not cut off), Lanjutan section, and add to cart all functioning correctly. Mobile testing blocked by navigation/viewport issues.

integration_issues.issue: After selecting customer 'Butik Bali Indah', address dropdown shows '-- Pilih alamat --' but selecting an address doesn't enable the Next button. Next button remains disabled, preventing progression to Step 2.
integration_issues.notes: Customer selection works, but address selection flow needs investigation. May be validation issue or address data not loading properly.

integration_issues.issue: Sales user at mobile viewport (390x844) lands on desktop Control Tower dashboard instead of mobile-specific MobileSalesApp. Sidebar navigation elements are outside viewport and cannot be clicked. Mobile catalog (data-testid='mobile-catalog') not rendering.
integration_issues.notes: Mobile breakpoint detection may not be working correctly. Expected: viewport <=768px should show MobileSalesApp for sales role. Actual: desktop layout rendered at 390px width. Unable to test mobile variant features due to this blocker.

passed_tests: ✓ Desktop Login & Navigation to POS
✓ Grouped Catalog Display - Batik Mega Mendung Premium shows '3 varian' badge
✓ Grouped Catalog Display - Endek Bali Rangrang shows '3 varian' badge
✓ Grouped Catalog Display - Price range displayed correctly (Rp 185.000 – Rp 215.000/meter)
✓ Grouped Catalog Display - Button label 'Pilih Varian' for multi-variant products
✓ ProductQuickView Popup - Opens via 'Pilih Varian' button click
✓ Variant Selection - Initial variant shows BTK-MEGA-001, Available: 755, Price: Rp 185.000
✓ Variant Selection - Switching to Merah variant updates SKU to BTK-MEGA-002, Available: 240
✓ Variant Selection - All values (SKU, Available, Reserved, Price) update correctly when switching variants
✓ Unit Selector (KNSelect) - Dropdown opens and displays ALL 5 options (Meter, Yard, Cm, Inch, Kg)
✓ Unit Selector - Options are FULLY VISIBLE (not cut off)
✓ Unit Selector - Dropdown appears ABOVE popup (correct z-index)
✓ Unit Selector - Yard selection works, shows conversion info '1 yard ≈ 0.914 meter'
✓ Qty Controls - Plus button increases quantity from 1 to 2
✓ Qty Controls - Input field accepts manual entry
✓ Lanjutan Section - Toggle button expands/collapses detail section
✓ Lanjutan Section - Stock breakdown table displays (Gudang Jakarta Utara: On Hand 240, Reserved 0, Available 240)
✓ Lanjutan Section - Ownership matrix displays (KSC entity with lot details)
✓ Add to Cart - Button works and adds variant to cart
✓ Add to Cart - Popup closes after successful add
✓ Add to Cart - Floating cart button appears with correct subtotal (Rp 338.328 for 2 yard)
✓ Checkout Drawer - Opens when clicking floating cart button
✓ Checkout Step 1 - Customer search and selection works ('Butik Bali Indah' selected successfully)
action_item_for_main_agent:
1. CHECKOUT ADDRESS SELECTION: Investigate why address selection in checkout Step 1 doesn't enable the Next button. Customer 'Butik Bali Indah' selects successfully, but address dropdown interaction needs fixing. Check address data loading and validation logic in CheckoutDrawer Step 1.

2. MOBILE VIEWPORT DETECTION: Sales role at mobile viewport (390x844) renders desktop layout instead of MobileSalesApp. Check responsive breakpoint logic and routing for sales role. Mobile catalog (MobileCatalog.jsx with data-testid='mobile-catalog') should render at viewport <=768px but currently doesn't. This blocks all mobile variant feature testing.

3. TESTING NOTES: Desktop variant feature is FULLY FUNCTIONAL and working as specified. All core requirements met: grouping, popup, variant selection, unit selector fix (not cut off, appears above popup), Lanjutan section, add to cart. Unable to complete mobile testing and end-to-end checkout due to above issues.
